import { SignatureFilled, ReadFilled, FileTextFilled, WechatFilled, FlagFilled, SunFilled, ToolFilled, } from "@ant-design/icons"; import casey from "../img/casey.JPG"; import journaling from "../img/journaling.jpg"; export const AboutMeContainer = () => { return (

This page is for getting to know me better. Here are some things I enjoy doing:

  •  Working with UX Design to solve problems
  •  Reading all kinds of books
  •  Journaling
  •  Get to know new people
  •  Playing Videogames
  •  Taking a walk with my dog
  •  Working on improving myself
); };
